name: Middle Eastern Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 leaf romaine lettuce, torn into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the top 1/4 from the pita pocket and reserve for another use.
2. Open the pita pocket and spread one side with hummus.
3. Spoon in tabouli.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: crumbled feta cheese, torn romaine lettuce, chopped tomato, alfalfa sprouts, and chopped Greek olives.
5. Drizzle salad dressing over all.
6. This serves one, but is easily multiplied for many.
Broiled pieces of pita bread are excellent for dipping extra hummus.
